channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Top Megelin Deals for Laser and LED Therapy Devices (2026)
item.description: This Mother's Day, Megelin is slashing prices on its best-selling laser and LED devices.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, May 9 (game #1566)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, May 9 (game #797)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, May 9 (game #1063)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Laid-off Oracle workers tried to negotiate better severance. Oracle said no.
item.description: Some found out they didn't qualify for WARN Act protections like two-months notice because the company had classified them as remote workers.

item.title: San Francisco’s housing market has lost its mind
item.description: The invisible force behind all of this is no mystery to anyone paying attention to the city's tech economy. San Francisco is home to some of the most valuable private companies in the world, and their employees have been quietly accumulating — and, increasingly, cashing out — fortunes.

item.title: I tried the lossless audio test and couldn't believe my ears. Can you really tell the difference between lossless audio and plain old MP3 versions of your favorite tunes?
item.description: At higher bitrates it's hard to tell the difference between lossy and lossless

item.title: Fuelled by AI, Micron's $50 billion chip factory in Idaho will use billions of litres of water every year — but the US tech giant stays silent on where that new water will come from
item.description: Micron’s Idaho expansion will sharply increase water use, raising concerns over sourcing, transparency, and long-term sustainability in a desert region

item.title: ChatGPT now lets you nominate a Trusted Contact who gets alerted if your interaction with AI 'indicates a serious safety concern'
item.description: On top of its existing safety systems, ChatGPT is giving users the option to designate a trusted adult to reach out to.

item.title: Why pay for 20 different AI subscriptions when this has all of them for $75?
item.description: Save 87% on a lifetime subscription to ChatPlayground AI and access 20+ AI models side-by-side for just $74.97.
